pr.title: RHAIFIRST-23: [BUG] architecture-context has no understanding of "Project Navigator"
pr.body:
The architecture documentation and meta tool discovery system had no
awareness of NeuralNav (Project Navigator), the composite module for
AI-driven model recommendations. This adds NeuralNav to the
ARCHITECTURE.md project structure and documents its tools, client flow,
and health check. It also registers a "recommendation" category in the
meta tools discovery system (TOOL_CATEGORIES, INTENT_PATTERNS) and adds
NeuralNav workflows and composite tool entries to the MCP resources, so
AI agents can discover recommend_model and get_deployment_config through
suggest_tools() and list_tool_categories().

Closes RHAIFIRST-23

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: James Tanner <jtanner@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
  * Added AI-driven model recommendation and optional deployment-configuration generation workflow (recommend + produce deployment config).

* **Documentation**
  * Added a NeuralNav Composite section to architecture docs with purpose, directory guidance, tool overview, call flow, defaults, and non-blocking health-check behavior.

* **Tests**
  * Added tests to validate discovery of the recommendation intent and that workflows include both recommendation and deployment steps.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
